Cinnb..Extremities: Pain in the limbs at night. Sensitive to sudden changes in the weather. Lame, bruised and stiff in all the limbs. Pains worse from motion. Syphilitic nodes on tibia.
Cinnb..Generalities: The symptoms are worse at night from warmth of the bed, and when perspiring, like Mercurius. Worse from both heat and cold,
Cinnb..Head: The pains in the head are violent; worse after eating; better by heat and pressure. Fullness in the whole head. Constriction. Pain in the cold forehead, which is ameliorated by heat. Tearing in the forehead before the menstrual flow. Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
Cinnb..Head, congestion, vertex: Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
Cinnb..Stomach: Aversion to food. Eructations, and vomiting. Tenderness of the stomach.
Cinnb..Clinical: Catarrhal inflammation. Fig warts (Thuja). Ulcers. Many complaints from eating. Syphilis in all stages. Suppurating glands; chancres.
Cinnb..Head, vertex: Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
Cinnb..Genitalia male: Inflammation of glans penis with profuse secretion of pus. Increased sexual desire. Swelling of prepuce with much itching. Warts on the prepuce and fraenum, bleeding when touched. Chancres on the prepuce of gangrenous odor. Inflamed and swollen chancres, hard, discharging pus. Indurated, or neglected chancres.
Cinnb..Extremities, lameness: Lame, bruised and stiff in all the limbs.
Cinnb..Generalities, night: The symptoms are worse at night from warmth of the bed, and when perspiring, like Mercurius.
Cinnb..Head, forehead: Pain in the cold forehead, which is ameliorated by heat. Tearing in the forehead before the menstrual flow. Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
Cinnb..Genitalia male, inflammation: Inflammation of glans penis with profuse secretion of pus. Inflamed and swollen chancres, hard, discharging pus.
Cinnb..Genitalia male, itching: Swelling of prepuce with much itching.
Cinnb..Genitalia male, swelling: Swelling of prepuce with much itching. Inflamed and swollen chancres, hard, discharging pus.
Cinnb..Head, fullness, forehead: Pain in the cold forehead, which is ameliorated by heat.
Cinnb..Genitalia male, penis: Inflammation of glans penis with profuse secretion of pus.
Cinnb..Genitalia male, glans: Inflammation of glans penis with profuse secretion of pus.
